zh.Perth and Kinross, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯
zh.West Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway於大約1150年出生在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯。她於大約1170年與Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1242年12月18日在英國盧特藍德森丁享年93歲。

zh-hans.West Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway于大约1150年出生在英国苏格兰培斯 安德 金洛斯。她于大约1170年与Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1242年12月18日在英国盧特藍德森丁享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

nameMeanings.name: Devorgilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway was born about 1150, in Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom. She married Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy about 1170, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 December 1242, in Whissendine, Rutland, England, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway est née environ 1150, à Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy environ 1170, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 décembre 1242, à Whissendine, Rutland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Gallowayは約1150年にイギリススコットランドペルス アンド キンロスで生まれた。約1170年にスコットランドでOrm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1242年12月18日にイギリスルトランドウィセンディンで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway(은)는 대략 1150년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1170년 스컷랜드에서 Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1242년 12월 18일 영국 루틀랜드 위센딘에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Perth and Kinross, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy aproximadamente 1170, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1242, em Whissendine, Rutland, Inglaterra, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Devorgilla De Stuteville de Galloway родилась около 1150 г. в местности пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Orm MacDuff Hugh d'Abernathy около 1170 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 декабря 1242 г. в местности уиссенден, рутланд, Англия в возрасте 93 лет.
